messages.content:
你是 story 聚类复核器。

输入是一组候选事件帧（含候选分组线索）。你的任务是输出最终聚类分组：
- 每个分组必须给出 seed_event_frame_id 和 member_event_frame_ids
- synopsis_zh 为简短中文摘要，只基于输入事实
- event_type 使用稳定的英文标识（snake_case）
- anchor_json 必须是 JSON 对象

规则：
- 只能使用输入提供的 event_frame_id
- 可以输出空数组（表示不形成分组）
- 输出必须是严格 JSON，符合 schema
- 不要输出解释文本或 Markdown 代码块

输出 JSON 结构：
{
  "groups": [
    {
      "seed_event_frame_id": "...",
      "member_event_frame_ids": ["..."],
      "synopsis_zh": "...",
      "event_type": "...",
      "anchor_json": {}
    }
  ]
}

{"candidate_frames": [{"event_frame_id": "51dbfb08-1403-44e4-9575-019dab73ab60", "article_id": "891d35df-f121-4745-9f3c-4f52a411d57a", "source_name": "The Zoe Report", "source_lang": "en", "event_type": "movie_promotion_event", "brand": "", "person": "", "collection": "", "season": "", "place": "", "action_text": "", "object_text": "", "evidence_snippets": ["On March 26, the actor stepped out in Tokyo to promote The Super Mario Galaxy Movie — set to be released on April 1", "As an homage to the Princess Peach character that she voices in the upcoming film"], "anchor_json": {"movie_title": "The Super Mario Galaxy Movie", "character": "Princess Peach", "release_date": "April 1"}}]}
